## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `/singularity-...`
2. ...
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages if any.

## Environment

- **singularity-claude version**: [e.g., 0.1.0]

Any other context, screenshots, or log output.
